title: viola × gerstlaueri
intro: Viola × gerstlaueri, also known as Gerstlauer's Violet, is a hybrid species of the flowering plant genus Viola, specifically a cross between Viola riviniana and Viola reichenbachiana. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × gerstlaueri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Viola × gerstlaueri can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
